summary: Code review completed for BLOCK 525 (ISO Empty State Clarification) and BLOCK 527 (Stripe Disconnect Guard). All code implementations are correct. Unable to test ISO empty state via UI since testuser1 HAS ISO records. Unable to test Stripe disconnect modal via UI since testuser1 doesn't have Stripe connected.

issues: Text color uses text-muted-foreground (approx #737373) instead of specified charcoal #4A4A4A. This is a minor color difference - consider updating CSS variable if exact color match is required.

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 525 ✅ - ISO empty state text correctly changed to 'These are records that you are actively searching for to purchase.' (Line 1079)
BLOCK 525 ✅ - Old text 'Post an ISO from The Hive to start searching!' is NOT present (verified via grep)
BLOCK 525 ⚠️ - Text is centered but uses text-muted-foreground class (~#737373) instead of specified charcoal #4A4A4A
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Stripe disconnect icon (Unplug) onClick triggers setShowStripeDisconnect(true) (Line 636)
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Modal headline is 'Are you sure?' (Line 1483)
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Modal body mentions 'The Honey Groove' (Line 1485)
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Cancel button has Honey Gold #FFBF00 styling with data-testid='stripe-disconnect-cancel' (Lines 1491-1493)
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Disconnect button has neutral grey styling (outline variant, text-stone-500, border-stone-300) with data-testid='stripe-disconnect-confirm' (Lines 1497-1500)
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Backend /api/stripe/disconnect only called on Disconnect button click (Line 1503)
BLOCK 527 ✅ - Cancel button closes modal via setShowStripeDisconnect(false) (Line 1490)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 525 and BLOCK 527 implementations verified via code review. testuser1 has ISO records so empty state cannot be UI tested. testuser1 doesn't have Stripe connected so disconnect modal cannot be UI tested. The Stripe disconnect modal code structure is correct with all required data-testid attributes. Minor note: ISO empty state text color uses default muted-foreground (~#737373) instead of specified charcoal #4A4A4A.
